examples.title: Algorithm: String Builder
examples.description: Demonstrates the basic concept of a string builder.
examples.code:
ALGORITHM StringBuilder
INPUT: initialCapacity
OUTPUT: StringBuilder object

BEGIN
 IF initialCapacity <= 0 THEN
 initialCapacity = 16
 END IF
 CREATE charArray WITH SIZE initialCapacity
 SET size TO 0
 RETURN StringBuilder object
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic concept of a string builder, including initialization with a specified capacity and default capacity.

examples.title: Java: String Builder
examples.description: Demonstrates the usage of the StringBuilder class in Java.
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates the usage of the StringBuilder class, including appending strings and converting the StringBuilder object to a String.

examples.title: Java: String Builder Methods
examples.description: Demonstrates various methods of the StringBuilder class in Java.
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates various methods of the StringBuilder class, including append, insert, delete, and reverse.
